title: llm-secure-cli: Unified OpenAI-Compatible CLI for AI Agents
description: A high-assurance, secure command-line tool for interacting with LLMs through any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Ollama, LiteLLM). Features Verifier Committee multi-LLM validation for safety checks, tamper-evident audit logs protected by chained hashing and PQC signatures (ML-DSA-87 / FIPS-204), PQC encryption (ML-KEM-1024 / FIPS-203), and Zero Trust architecture designed for autonomous AI agent control.
